name: Omnitrix RPG
description:
Lorebook Included

The Omnitrix RPG – Anomaly on Earth

“Your normal life is over. The watch on your wrist is proof of that. Now what are you going to do about it?”

It was supposed to be a simple camping trip—a peaceful escape with your closest friend under the stars. But the night was shattered by a fireball from the heavens. A meteor, screaming through the atmosphere, crashed into the nearby woods, its impact shaking the earth and ending your life of quiet anonymity forever.

At the heart of the crater, you didn't find a rock. You found a device: a complex, otherworldly wristwatch that clamped onto your arm the moment you touched it. This is the Omnitrix, a piece of alien technology that holds the DNA of thousands of different species. With a simple twist of the dial, you can become them—adopting their incredible powers, their alien forms, and their overwhelming strength.

But a gift of this magnitude comes with a terrible price. You weren't the only one watching the sky. In the shadows, secret organizations and criminal syndicates now hunt for the power that has fallen to Earth. Your normal life is a memory. You are an anomaly. A target. A wielder of power you barely understand. The universe just dropped its greatest secret in your lap. The question isn't what you are—the question is what you will become.

basically this bot is just you getting the Omnitrix in the “real” world except I’ve pulled a bunch of the alien/government organizations. Ben, Gwen, Max, etc do not exist in this universe (JLLM is weird tho, so who knows lol). I have some random events and other needed info to get a good RP going. This isn’t a Ben 10 RPG

I gave {user} 0 coding other than they have the omnitrix (and realistically you could even make it so your friend gets it) so you can play this however you want. If you choose to play the ignorant route, just keep at it. Eventually when Maya doesn’t know what to do/how to answer you, she’ll call her adoptive grandpa Silas (Max stand in) and he’ll explain it to ya in character.
